summary: Bar Alto has an existing website, and the strongest useful gap is: trust signal is not strong in the first screen.
outreachHook: I noticed your site has a fixable conversion gap: The first captured text block does not clearly surface reviews, warranty, credentials, years, or local proof.
openDesignDirection: Bar Alto should feel like the obvious restaurant choice in Brisbane. Add a compact trust strip near the hero: reviews, warranty/licence claims when verified, service area, and response promise. Use one H1 focused on the primary service/location promise.

captured.title: Bar Alto, Modern Italian Restaurant, Brisbane

findings.title: Trust signal is not strong in the first screen
findings.evidence: The first captured text block does not clearly surface reviews, warranty, credentials, years, or local proof.
findings.impact: For local services, trust often matters before design polish.
findings.fix: Add a compact trust strip near the hero: reviews, warranty/licence claims when verified, service area, and response promise.

findings.title: Basic trust/legal links are thin
findings.evidence: Privacy or terms links were not captured from visible page links.
findings.impact: This is a minor trust and SEO hygiene gap, especially when forms collect customer data.
findings.fix: Add privacy and terms links in the footer when forms or tracking are used.

checks.title: Bar Alto, Modern Italian Restaurant, Brisbane
checks.metaDescription: Bar Alto is a modern Italian restaurant located at the Brisbane Powerhouse, nestled on the beautiful banks of the Brisbane River.

og.title: Bar Alto, Modern Italian Restaurant, Brisbane
og.description: Bar Alto is a modern Italian restaurant located at the Brisbane Powerhouse, nestled on the beautiful banks of the Brisbane River.

twitter.title: Bar Alto, Modern Italian Restaurant, Brisbane
twitter.description: Bar Alto is a modern Italian restaurant located at the Brisbane Powerhouse, nestled on the beautiful banks of the Brisbane River.

findings.title: H1 structure needs cleanup
findings.impact: A single clear H1 helps both search and page comprehension.
findings.fix: Use one H1 focused on the primary service/location promise.

findings.title: Image alt text is weak
findings.evidence: 5 image(s) missing alt attribute and 11 image(s) have empty alt.
findings.impact: Images do not help accessibility, local proof, or image-search context.
findings.fix: Add descriptive alt text for content images; keep decorative images empty intentionally.

findings.title: Social sharing tags are incomplete
findings.evidence: OG title: true, description: true, image: false.
findings.impact: Shared previews may look weak when sent in email, SMS, or social DMs.
findings.fix: Add og:title, og:description, and og:image that match the redesigned positioning.
